comments.replyBody: Fixed. After the poller completes, `runPoll` now calls `runRepository.updateStatusByUuid` to transition the synthetic run to a terminal status (`passed` for all_resolved/max_polls_reached, `failed` for timed_out, `cancelled` for blocked). This ensures `findActiveRuns` and `insertIfNoActive` no longer treat the exited poll run as active. Added tests covering all terminal state mappings and verifying no status update occurs when the poller throws.
